reviews.comment:
Los surtidores estan mal, te marcan que cargas mas y te cobran cara la nafta. No vayan, asi los turistas se van a Brasil.... Cuiden al turista!

(Translated by Google)
The pumps are faulty; they register that you're filling up too much and charge you a lot for gas. Don't go there, that's why tourists are going to Brazil... Take care of the tourists!

reviews.comment:
Como siempre digo es el lugar ideal si venís a Gesell por tramites, para hacer un impase, sentarte un rato, tomar un café o comer algunos de los platos que cada día preparan. Buena atención, impecable todo siempre y cumpliendo con todos los protocolos sanitarios. Además claro podes cargar combustible de YPF. Si sos socio del Automóvil Club Argentino consulta las opciones para utilizar el recreo, que es un espacio verde arbolado con álamos, acacias, siempre verdes entre las especies que se destacan y cuenta con mesas y parrillas.

(Translated by Google)
As I always say, it's the ideal place if you're in Gesell for errands, to take a break, sit for a while, have a coffee, or enjoy some of the dishes they prepare daily. Excellent service, everything is always impeccable, and they comply with all health protocols. Plus, of course, you can fill up your tank at YPF. If you're a member of the Automóvil Club Argentino, inquire about the options for using the recreation area, a wooded green space with poplars, acacias, and evergreens among the notable species, complete with tables and grills.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2aTdDUUF3EAE
